title: Audit ferrolearn-model-sel vs sklearn (model_selection + pipeline + compose + multiclass + multioutput + dummy + frozen + inspection + calibration): close gaps, add API proof tests
description:
Step 9 of 12 in sklearn parity audit (#240).

Catch-all crate covering many small sklearn modules. Scope: sklearn.model_selection (CV splitters, search CV, learning_curve, validation_curve, cross_validate), sklearn.pipeline (Pipeline, FeatureUnion, make_pipeline, make_union), sklearn.compose (ColumnTransformer, TransformedTargetRegressor), sklearn.multiclass (OneVsRestClassifier, OneVsOneClassifier, OutputCodeClassifier), sklearn.multioutput (MultiOutputClassifier, MultiOutputRegressor, ClassifierChain, RegressorChain), sklearn.dummy (DummyClassifier, DummyRegressor), sklearn.frozen (FrozenEstimator), sklearn.inspection (partial_dependence, permutation_importance, PartialDependenceDisplay, DecisionBoundaryDisplay), sklearn.calibration (CalibratedClassifierCV, calibration_curve).

Related existing issues: #40-42 (Stacking), #170 (make_pipeline/union), #171 (FixedThresholdClassifier/TunedThresholdClassifierCV — overlap with linear), #216-220 (Dummy*, partial_dependence, permutation_importance), #221
